description: Long-term Cloudflare HTTP analytics and Access authentication activity. HTTP analytics are adaptive, sampled estimates supplied by Cloudflare; counts and byte totals are already estimated and must not be multiplied by the sample interval. Detailed firewall events, bot scores, per-request threat context, and origin latency are unavailable on the current plan.

panels.description: Estimated HTTP request rate from Cloudflare adaptive analytics.
panels.title: Request rate (estimated)

panels.description: Estimated response data transfer per second. Cloudflare's adaptive HTTP dataset does not expose request-body bytes.
panels.title: Data transfer (estimated)

panels.description: Share of estimated cache requests reported as hit or revalidated.
panels.title: Cache-hit ratio (estimated)

panels.description: Estimated client and server error rates by HTTP status class.
panels.title: 4xx / 5xx rate (estimated)

panels.description: Aggregate enforcement activity is a heuristic; detailed firewall events and request-level threat context are unavailable.
panels.title: Enforcement actions / 10m

panels.description: Allowed Access authentications from non-owner user or unknown identity types. Individual identities are intentionally not exported.
panels.title: Unexpected Access logins / 5m

panels.description: Estimated request rate grouped by normalized hostname.
panels.title: Requests by hostname (estimated)

panels.description: Estimated response data-transfer rate by hostname.
panels.title: Data transfer by hostname (estimated)

panels.description: Estimated request rate grouped by HTTP status code.
panels.title: Status distribution (estimated)

panels.description: Estimated request rate grouped by hostname and Cloudflare cache status.
panels.title: Cache performance (estimated)

panels.description: Top countries by estimated request rate. Country is derived from Cloudflare's edge classification.
panels.title: Top countries (estimated)

panels.description: Top normalized hostnames by estimated request rate.
panels.title: Top hostnames (estimated)

panels.description: Aggregate enforcement activity by action and source. This is an estimated heuristic, not request-level firewall event data.
panels.title: Enforcement actions (estimated)

panels.description: Cloudflare Access authentication outcomes in rolling five-minute windows.
panels.title: Access allowed / denied / error trends

panels.description: Most recent observed Access authentication per application, decision, bounded principal type, and owner classification. Individual identities are intentionally not exported.
panels.title: Latest Access authentication by app and identity type

panels.description: Estimated 4xx and 5xx request ratios by hostname.

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (host) (rate(cloudflare_http_requests_total{zone=~"$zone", host=~"$host", status=~"4.."}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (host) (rate(cloudflare_http_requests_total{zone=~"$zone", host=~"$host"}[$__rate_interval])), 1)

100 * sum by (host) (rate(cloudflare_http_requests_total{zone=~"$zone", host=~"$host", status=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (host) (rate(cloudflare_http_requests_total{zone=~"$zone", host=~"$host"}[$__rate_interval])), 1)

panels.title: HTTP error rates by hostname (estimated)

panels.description: Age of the last successful Cloudflare poll by collector component.
panels.title: Last successful poll age

panels.description: Collector catch-up backlog or active catch-up state by polling component.
panels.title: Catch-up state

panels.description: A non-zero value means a zone or Access feed fell outside its bounded recovery window and the missing interval cannot be recovered.
panels.title: Irreversible history gaps

panels.description: Collector Cloudflare API error rate by operation.
panels.title: Cloudflare API error rate

panels.description: Cloudflare adaptive sampling value by zone. Exported counts and sums are already estimates; do not multiply them by this value.
panels.title: Adaptive sample interval (transparency)

title: Cloudflare Overview
